---
title: "Contributors"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false

library(yaml)
library(htmltools)

authors <- yaml::read_yaml("authors.yml")

last_name <- function(x) tail(strsplit(x$name, " ")[[1]], 1)
editors   <- Filter(function(x) x$status == "editor", authors)
others    <- Filter(function(x) x$status != "editor", authors)
editors   <- editors[order(sapply(editors, last_name))]
others    <- others[order(sapply(others,  last_name))]
sorted    <- c(editors, others)

status_badge <- function(status) {
  color <- switch(status,
    editor  = "background:#2c6e49;color:#fff;",
    member  = "background:#1d4e89;color:#fff;",
    guest   = "background:#6c757d;color:#fff;",
    "background:#aaa;color:#fff;"
  )
  tags$span(style = paste0("font-size:0.72em;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;", color),
            tools::toTitleCase(status))
}

orcid_badge <- function(orcid) {
  tags$a(href = paste0("https://orcid.org/", orcid), target = "_blank",
         style = "text-decoration:none;",
    tags$img(src = "https://info.orcid.org/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/orcid_16x16.png",
             style = "vertical-align:middle;margin-right:4px;"),
    tags$span(style = "font-size:0.8em;color:#a6ce39;", orcid)
  )
}

photo_tag <- function(id, name) {
  path <- file.path("assets", "authors", paste0(id, ".jpg"))
  if (file.exists(path)) {
    tags$img(src = path, alt = name,
             style = "width:90px;height:90px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%;margin-bottom:8px;")
  } else {
    NULL
  }
}

make_card <- function(a) {
  name_tag <- if (!is.null(a$url)) {
    tags$a(href = a$url, target = "_blank",
           style = "font-weight:600;font-size:1.05em;text-decoration:none;", a$name)
  } else {
    tags$span(style = "font-weight:600;font-size:1.05em;", a$name)
  }

  tags$div(class = "g-col-12 g-col-sm-6 g-col-md-4",
    tags$div(style = "border:1px solid #e0e0e0;border-radius:8px;padding:16px;text-align:center;height:100%;",
      photo_tag(a$id, a$name),
      name_tag,
      tags$br(),
      status_badge(a$status),
      if (!is.null(a$orcid))       tagList(tags$br(), orcid_badge(a$orcid))              else NULL,
      if (!is.null(a$affiliation)) tagList(tags$br(), tags$small(a$affiliation))          else NULL,
      if (!is.null(a$notes))       tagList(tags$br(), tags$small(style="color:#555;", a$notes)) else NULL
    )
  )
}

tagList(
  tags$div(class = "grid", lapply(sorted, make_card))
)
```
